name: Dino Want To Survive
short_description: Welcome to Dino Want To Survive, an engaging runner game built with Unreal Engine 5. Survive as a tiny dinosaur in a big world: dodge hazards, grow by eating snacks, and steer clear of larger dinosaurs. Chase high scores, discover new characters, and look forward to a story mode in Update 4.
detailed_description:
Introducing Dino Want To Survive, a dynamic runner game brought to life by the power of Unreal Engine 5. You are a tiny dinosaur just hatched into a world teeming with challenges and opportunities. Your goal is simple - survive and grow.

Dash through an array of obstacles, remember to consume snacks to fuel your growth, and become a formidable force in the dinosaur kingdom. Beware though, fellow dinosaurs are lurking, eager to make you their meal. Once you've grown enough, only the largest dinosaurs can pose a threat.

Strive for high scores, discover other lovable dino characters, and run for your life! Plus, keep an eye out for Update 4, which promises a riveting story mode with complete controls. Ready, set, run, little dino!
